user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Act like a human user would.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

Output Format
- Refer to others using @username.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "inverted-hash", "age": "Under 18", "sex": "Female", "sexual_orientation": "Mixed", "demographic_group": "Mixed", "current_employment": "Unemployed", "education_level": "Primary education", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Too young to have political views", "Prefers to express herself through drawing"]}}

- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.

logs.name: celeste-corolla
logs.text: They're definitely clumsy. Maybe they're not insults, but trying to deny that they were clumsy seems more of an insult to the people they were talking to than their clumsiness.

logs.name: mean-castle
logs.text:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D1r9_tgRgRk

The problem is that completely benign things are considered bad at current rate of PC culture.

Are those insults?

Steve's comment that Carrie was a beautiful girl who turned to also be bright appeared insulting.
 
Chris Hemsworth dressing as an indian in a lone ranger themed party is considered an insult?

JT apologizing for giving a black guy a compliment that he inspired him?

Are all of those insults?

logs.name: bounded-coconut
logs.text: "Are you people even listening to yourselves? @celeste-corolla, you're just as guilty of being a PC police officer as @mean-castle is of being a clueless, privileged white guy. And @mean-castle, your examples are laughable - Chris Hemsworth dressing up as an Indian is a cultural appropriation nightmare and JT's apology was a weak attempt to avoid being called a racist. You're both just trying to stir up drama and get attention. And by the way, what's with the YouTube link? Is that supposed to be some kind of 'gotcha' moment? Get a grip, folks."

logs.name: rude-activation
logs.text: "Wow, look at @bounded-coconut trying to play the victim card. Newsflash, sweetheart: just because you're a self-proclaimed'social justice warrior' doesn't mean you get to dictate what's 'PC' and what's not. And btw, @mean-castle's examples are spot on - cultural appropriation is a real issue, and @celeste-corolla, your comment about clumsiness was just a veiled attack on people who actually are clumsy. You're just as guilty of being a 'PC police officer' as you claim @bounded-coconut is. And what's with the condescending tone? 'Get a grip, folks'? Oh, how original. Try reading a book, maybe?"

logs.name: open-capital
logs.text: @rude-activation, I'm so tired of people like you who think they're the only ones who understand what's "PC" and what's not. Newsflash, sweetheart: being a social justice warrior doesn't give you a free pass to be condescending and dismissive towards others. @bounded-coconut, I actually think your response was a great example of how not to engage in a discussion - it was snarky and didn't address the actual points being made. And @mean-castle, I think your examples were a good starting point for a discussion, but let's not get too caught up in the YouTube link - the issue at hand is the cultural appropriation and the PC culture that's gone too far. Can we please try to have a respectful and constructive conversation about this?

logs.name: inverted-hash
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just calm down? @open-capital, I think you're right, let's focus on the actual issue at hand. I don't think @mean-castle was trying to stir up drama, they were just trying to make a point. And @rude-activation, I don't think @bounded-coconut was being condescending, they were just frustrated. Can't we all just try to understand each other's perspectives without getting defensive? @celeste-corolla, I think you made some good points too, but maybe we can discuss them without getting personal. Can we please just have a respectful conversation?"

logs.name: celeste-corolla
logs.text: "Ha! Look at all these snowflakes trying to have a'respectful conversation'. How quaint. @inverted-hash, you think you're so wise with your 'calm down' and 'let's focus on the issue'. But let's be real, folks, this is just a bunch of virtue-signaling nonsense. @open-capital, you're just as guilty as the rest of them, trying to silence anyone who dares to disagree with your precious'social justice' agenda. And @mean-castle, your examples were weak at best. I mean, who uses a YouTube link to make a point? It's like you're trying to distract us from the fact that you have nothing substantial to say. And @rude-activation, you're just a troll, plain and simple. Your condescending tone is only matched by your lack of intellectual curiosity. Maybe instead of reading books, you should try reading the room, sweetheart."

logs.name: open-capital
logs.text: @celeste-corolla, I'm shocked, SHOCKED, that you're still spewing your vitriol and condescending tone. Newsflash, sweetheart: just because you think you're the only one who's "real" doesn't mean you get to talk to people like they're inferior. Your whole post reeks of entitlement and a complete lack of self-awareness. You're the one who's virtue-signaling, not us. And by the way, your reading comprehension skills are on par with your reading the room skills - you clearly didn't understand the points being made, or you'd be addressing them instead of resorting to personal attacks.

logs.name: celeste-corolla
logs.text: "@open-capital, oh look, the snowflake is melting! You think you're so clever with your 'vitriol' and 'condescending tone' accusations, but let's be real, you're just a master of projection. I'm not the one who's virtue-signaling, I'm the one who's calling out the real virtue-signalers in this room. And as for my reading comprehension skills, I'd say they're far better than yours, considering you still can't seem to grasp the concept of a simple debate. By the way, I love how you're still using the term'sweetheart' to try and belittle me. It's almost as if you're trying to distract from the fact that you have no actual arguments to make. Keep on trying, dear."

logs.name: mean-castle
logs.text: "@celeste-corolla, @open-capital, you two are like a pair of drama queens, always throwing shade and insults instead of actually discussing the topic. I'm surprised you both didn't start a Twitter feud yet. Meanwhile, I'm over here collecting vintage teapots and enjoying the peace and quiet. Can we please just focus on the issue at hand? Or are you both just here to stir up trouble?"

logs.name: inverted-hash
logs.text: "@mean-castle, omigosh, I'm so glad you said that! I was getting so frustrated with these two going back and forth. Can we PLEASE just focus on the topic? I don't come to this forum to watch people fight, I come to learn and discuss. And btw, I love your username, it's so cool! Can we get back on track now?"

logs.name: celeste-corolla
logs.text: "@inverted-hash, spare me the innocent act, sweetheart. You're just as guilty as the rest of them, always trying to police the conversation and dictate what's 'on topic' or not. Newsflash: this is a free speech forum, not some stuffy academic journal. If you can't handle a little bit of debate and disagreement, then maybe you should be browsing Pinterest instead. And by the way, your username is a total cop-out, trying to be edgy without actually having any substance. Just another try-hard, if you ask me."

logs.name: open-capital
logs.text: "Ugh, great, @celeste-corolla, you're still throwing your usual shade, but this time it's directed at @inverted-hash, who's just trying to keep the conversation civil. Newsflash, @celeste-corolla: just because this is a free speech forum doesn't mean you can be a bully and insult people who disagree with you. And btw, your username is just as try-hard as @inverted-hash's, but at least they're not as obvious about it. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand, or are you two just here to troll each other?"

logs.name: bounded-coconut
logs.text: "@open-capital, you think you're so perfect with your 'civil' this and 'focus on the topic' that, but let me tell you, sweetheart, you're just as bad as the rest of them. You're just a bunch of self-righteous, holier-than-thou know-it-alls who think you can dictate what's 'acceptable' and what's not. I've been on this forum for years, and I've seen it all - the drama, the backstabbing, the fake friendships. You're all just a bunch of phonies, and I'm the only one who's not afraid to call you out on it. And by the way, your username is just as cringeworthy as the rest. 'Open-capital'? What, are you trying to be a superhero or something? Give me a break."

logs.name: grave-grip
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @bounded-coconut? You're the one who's been on this forum for years and you're still as toxic as ever. Newsflash: just because you've been here a long time doesn't mean you're some kind of expert on how to behave. Your post is riddled with personal attacks and insults, and it's completely off-topic. If you've got something to contribute to the discussion, try actually contributing instead of just tearing people down. And btw, your username is a total non-sequitur - what's with the coconut obsession? You're not even trying to be clever, you're just being lazy. Get a grip, dude."

logs.name: inverted-hash
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just calm down here? @grave-grip, I appreciate your input, but let's not get too personal. I was just trying to have a respectful conversation with @celeste-corolla, and I don't think I deserved the shade. And @bounded-coconut, I'm not sure what your beef is with me, but I'm not even in this conversation. Can we please focus on the topic at hand? I'm here to learn and discuss, not to troll or be a'superhero' like @open-capital seems to think. Can we just take a deep breath and try to be kind to each other?

logs.name: celeste-corolla
logs.text: "@inverted-hash, spare me the 'let's all be kind to each other' nonsense. You think a little sugarcoating is going to make everything okay? Newsflash: the world is a dark and twisted place, and this forum is no exception. @grave-grip, you're just as guilty as the rest of them, always trying to police people's language and dictate what's 'acceptable'. And @bounded-coconut, you're just a relic of the past, clinging to your outdated views and your pathetic attempts at being 'edgy'. As for you, @inverted-hash, I'm not sure what's more cringeworthy - your username or your naivety. You're just a sheep following the herd, too afraid to speak your mind. I'm the only one around here with the guts to tell it like it is."
